title: Potato Foods
description: This mod adds a couple potato inspired foods. The mod glorifies poisonous potatoes as well, as it should.
body:
Adds some cool Potato Food Items.

I just don't want to be eating golden carrots. So I made a potato eqiuvalent. And maybe somethings more to lighten yer mood.

I'm looking to add sweet potatoes in the future and maybe compacted potato blocks!
